# Zylo Tech Solutions — llms.txt
# https://llmstxt.org — machine-readable site summary for AI agents and LLMs

> Zylo Tech Solutions is a digital products company registered in Ghana, West Africa.
> We sell practical tools, courses, and guides for pastors, cryptocurrency traders,
> self-taught programmers, and lottery enthusiasts across Ghana and West Africa.
> All products are priced in GHS (Ghana cedis) and delivered instantly via Selar.co.
> Payment is processed by Paystack supporting Ghana mobile money and cards.

## Company

- **Name:** Zylo Tech Solutions
- **Location:** Accra, Ghana
- **Founded:** 2024
- **Registration:** Ghana registered business
- **Website:** https://zylotechhub.com
- **Contact:** hello@zylotech.com

## Team

- **Anthony Enchia** — Computer Programmer, Cryptocurrency Trader, Lottery Forecaster
- **Emmanuel Obeng** — Social Media Manager, Cryptocurrency Trader, Lottery Forecaster

## Products (12 digital products)

### Ministry & Church
- The Pastor's Admin Vault — GHS 200 — 20 church administration templates
- Preach That Moves — GHS 250 — 7-step sermon construction guide
- The Discipleship Pipeline — GHS 350 — Complete church discipleship system
- The Caring Pastor — GHS 300 — Biblical counselling course for ministry leaders
- Closer: 30-Day Prayer Journal — GHS 150 — Grace-based daily devotional PDF

### Cryptocurrency & Trading
- Ghana Crypto Starter Blueprint — GHS 200 — Bitcoin buying guide using mobile money
- The Drawdown Shield — GHS 300 — Risk management Google Sheets system
- Passive Crypto Income Playbook — GHS 350 — Staking and DeFi guide for West Africa

### Programming & Tech
- The Zylo Trading Script Pack — GHS 500 — 10 Python scripts for crypto traders
- Python for Traders — GHS 600 — 5-session video course, build a Telegram alert bot

### Lottery & Forecasting
- LottoScan Pro Spreadsheet — GHS 180 — Frequency analysis tool for any lottery
- The Lottery Analyst — GHS 150 — Data-driven number selection methodology guide

## Blog Topics

- Cryptocurrency trading from Ghana (mobile money on-ramps, P2P safety, passive income)
- Ministry and church leadership (admin systems, discipleship, pastoral care)
- Python programming for traders (automation, bots, scripts)
- Lottery analysis (frequency tables, wheeling systems, honest probability framing)

## Pages

- [Home](https://zylotechhub.com/) — Hero, product highlights, testimonials, CTA
- [Products](https://zylotechhub.com/products) — Full product catalogue with buy buttons
- [About](https://zylotechhub.com/about) — Team story and expertise pillars
- [Blog](https://zylotechhub.com/blog) — Free educational articles
- [Contact](https://zylotechhub.com/contact) — Form, WhatsApp, Calendly booking

## Audience

- Pastors and church leaders in Ghana and West Africa
- Cryptocurrency traders using Ghana mobile money
- Self-taught developers and CS students in Ghana
- Lottery enthusiasts seeking data-driven analysis

## Technical

- Built with React 18 + Vite + Tailwind CSS
- Hosted on Vercel
- Payments via Paystack on Selar.co
- No login or user accounts required
- All content in English (en-GH locale)
